free_text: Neutron-induced fission cross section of natPb and
209Bi from threshold to 1 GeV: An improved
Pole Univ. Leonard de Vinci, Paris La Defense
Neutrons from Pb target irradiated by 20 GeV/c
protons moderated by water surrounding the target
- Pb, 209Bi: Vacuum evaporated on 240 ug/cm2 Mylar foil
- 235U,238U: Electrodeposited on 2.5 um thick Al foils
23151.005/004 are about 9% higher than than obtained
from reference values (standards below 200 MeV) in the
evaluation by B.Marcinkevicius et al., INDC(NDS)-0681.
